body.docName: 分页查询集采平台映射规则
body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/rule/page 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/rule/page 
 ## 接口描述 
用于医招智付场景查询集采平台与院内的字段映射规则，例如药品映射规则与供应商映射规则等，单次查询上限500条 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"mapType","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","exampleValue":"drug","desc":"%20%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%9Asupplier%E3%80%81%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%9Adrug"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platformCode","required":true,"label":"%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"fuJianProvincePlatform","desc":"%20%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0D%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%8B%8F%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangSuProvincePlatform%20%20%0D%0A%E7%A6%8F%E5%BB%BA%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AfuJianProvincePlatform%20%20%0D%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangXiProvincePlatform"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"targetIdList","required":false,"label":"%E7%9B%AE%E6%A0%87%EF%BC%88%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%EF%BC%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%221771065586239942657%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%8B%A5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AC%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%BA%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%E8%8B%A5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AC%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%BA%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A500%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"sourceIdList","label":"%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%88%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%EF%BC%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22ZE0002%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%8B%A5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AC%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%BA%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E4%BA%A7%E5%93%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%E8%8B%A5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AC%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%BA%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A500%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"start","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E8%B5%B7%E5%A7%8B%E9%A1%B5%E6%95%B0","exampleValue":"0","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"INTEGER","name":"limit","required":true,"label":"%E5%88%86%E9%A1%B5%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F","exampleValue":"50","desc":"","maxLength":"500"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
  "mapType": "drug",
  "platformCode": "jiangXiProvincePlatform",
  "sourceIdList":["1610830356198977538","1610830356198977539","1610830356198977537"],
  "targetIdList":["1610830356198977538"],
  "start":0,
  "limit":2
}
```
#### 响应报文
```json
{
    "body": {
        "total": 1,
        "list": [
            {
                "sourceId": "1610830356198977538",
                "sourceName": "复合维生素B片",
                "targetId": "1610830356198977538",
                "targetName": "复合维生素B片"
            }
        ]
    },
    "returnCode": "SUC0000",
    "success": true,
    "message": "成功"
}
`  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1| 调用失败|
  | EROOR2| 执行失败，分页查出最大限制、当前企业未配置集采平台信息等|
  | SUC0000| 执行成功|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/rule/page

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/rule/page

接口描述

用于医招智付场景查询集采平台与院内的字段映射规则，例如药品映射规则与供应商映射规则等，单次查询上限500条

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"mapType","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E6%9E%9A%E4%B8%BE","exampleValue":"drug","desc":"%20%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%9Asupplier%E3%80%81%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%9Adrug"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platformCode","required":true,"label":"%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"fuJianProvincePlatform","desc":"%20%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0D%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%8B%8F%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangSuProvincePlatform%20%20%0D%0A%E7%A6%8F%E5%BB%BA%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AfuJianProvincePlatform%20%20%0D%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangXiProvincePlatform"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"targetIdList","required":false,"label":"%E7%9B%AE%E6%A0%87%EF%BC%88%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%EF%BC%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%221771065586239942657%22%5D","desc":"%20%E8%8B%A5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AC%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%BA%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%E7%9B%AE%E5%BD%95%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%E8%8B%A5%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E4%BE%9B%E5%BA%94%E5%95%86%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%EF%BC%8C%E6%9C%AC%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E4%B8%BA%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E9%85%8D%E9%80%81%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E4%BB%A3%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%9B%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E6%9F%A5%E8%AF%A2%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A500%E6%9D%A1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"sourceIdList","label":"%E6%BA%90%EF%BC%88%E9%99%A2%E5%86%85%EF%BC%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5ID%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22Z
